item.name: Gobwalker Gear
item.description: An oddly shaped metal cog that has been removed from an Illuminati-constructed gobwalker. Using it should restore the machine's controls.

mount.name: Gobwalker
mount.action: Call into battle your gobwalker, a steam-powered war vehicle designed by the infamous Illuminati.
mount.description: Originally designed to be a less-fickle replacement for pack raptors, the gobwalker was quickly reoutfitted into a tool of war after it took twenty goblins to chase down and topple a walker that had gone out of control and destroyed an entire workshop.
mount.tooltip:
Ye would have more luck
findin'...well, a gobmachine
bangplate on a tree!
- Papana

obj.n: Alexander - The Burden of the Father (Savage)
